title: × Depazium lobatocrenatum
taxonomy: × Depazium lobatocrenatum is a species in the family Arecaceae, which is a group of palms. It belongs to the genus × Depazium, a hybrid of Depazea and a related genus. The exact classification of this species is not widely known, but it is believed to be a palm native to Madagascar. Further research is needed to confirm its exact classification and distribution. Its classification as a hybrid palm makes it a unique and interesting species.
